history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up photo shows a young boy facing the camera and making a peace sign with his right hand against a plain blue background.

Main Subject:
The boy has short dark hair, a visible open mouth, and his right hand raised near his face with two fingers extended in a peace sign. He appears to be looking toward the camera.

Setting:
The background is a solid, flat blue color with no visible objects. The image appears indoors or in a studio-like setting due to the simple background.

Visual Details:
The lighting is even and soft, illuminating the boy’s face and hand. His skin tone appears light, his eyebrows and eyelashes are dark, and his eyes are partially open. He wears a dark sleeveless top. The camera is at a close range, angled straight toward his face, with his head and hand occupying most of the frame.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up of a boy posing for the camera with a peace sign. The simple blue background keeps the focus on his face and hand gesture.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
